Name: Category chip
Description: JAR / CARBOY / BOTTLE / TOOL / TESTER / PART chip on the Jars & Tools PDP. Reused by cart drawer line items and cross-sell cards.

Name: Features section heading
Description: Heading for the 'Why this design' section on the Jars & Tools PDP.

Name: Features section intro
Description: 1-2 sentence intro paragraph above the features grid.

Name: Specs table
Description: Array of [label, value] pairs for the specifications table. Used by the Jars & Tools PDP.

Name: Compatible with
Description: Text for the 'Works with' strip under the specs table.

Name: Cart add-on suggestions
Description: List of related products the GB cart drawer suggests as 'Frequently added' when this product is in the cart.
